engineGuide.h2: Nissan Lafesta Engine Codes - Full Technical Specifications & Replacement Guide
engineGuide.h3: Every engine code fitted to the Nissan Lafesta across all generations, with technical specs, compatible variants and trims, known failure points, and average rebuilt prices from UK specialists. Select any engine code to compare quotes.

entries.title: 2.0L Petrol
entries.history: The QR20DE powered most M11/M12 Lafestas, offering reliable port-injection performance but plagued by timing chain tensioner weaknesses documented in Nissan TSBs.
compatibleVariants: 1.8L Base, 2.0L Petrol, 2.0L 4WD, Highway Star, Highway Star 4WD, 7-Seater MPV, Station Wagon
commonFailures: Timing chain tensioner failure (60k-100k miles) - Nissan TSB documented
Oil pump wear leading to low oil pressure
Head gasket failure on high-mileage units
entries.cta: Get quotes for QR20DE Nissan Lafesta engine replacement

entries.title: 1.8L Petrol
entries.history: The entry-level QR18DE offered adequate performance for base Lafesta models, sharing QR20DE architecture but with reduced displacement and lower replacement demand.
commonFailures: Oil pump wear at higher mileage
Minor timing chain stretch (less severe than QR20DE)
Fuel injector clogging on neglected units
entries.cta: Get quotes for QR18DE Nissan Lafesta engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Direct Injection Turbo
entries.history: The MR20DDT brought turbocharged direct injection to the B35 Lafesta, improving efficiency but introducing carbon buildup concerns on intake valves common to DI engines.
compatibleVariants: B35 2.0L, B35 Highway Star, B35 2.0L 4WD, B35 7-Seater, B35 Station Wagon
commonFailures: Carbon buildup on intake valves (direct injection characteristic)
Turbocharger oil seal leaks at higher mileage
entries.cta: Get quotes for MR20DDT Nissan Lafesta engine replacement

entries.title: 1.8L Direct Injection Turbo
entries.history: The MR18DDT served as the economical turbocharged option for B35 Lafesta models, balancing fuel efficiency with adequate power for family MPV duties.
compatibleVariants: B35 1.8L Base, B35 1.8L 2WD, B35 entry-level trims
entries.cta: Get quotes for MR18DDT Nissan Lafesta engine replacement

commonProblems.h2: Nissan Lafesta Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Nissan Lafesta's petrol engines are generally robust, but QR20DE units (2004-2011) suffer documented timing chain tensioner failures, while B35 MR-series engines face direct injection carbon buildup. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty.

problems.h4: Nissan Lafesta Timing Chain Failure - Why QR20DE Engines Fail Prematurely
problems.rootCause: Weak factory timing chain tensioner design allows chain stretch; Nissan issued technical service bulletins acknowledging the issue.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace timing chain, tensioner, guides before catastrophic failure
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if caught early; prevents engine damage

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Full timing set replacement plus valve timing reset
repairOptions.longevity: May extend life 30-50k miles if no internal damage

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt QR20DE with upgraded tensioner (OEM 13075-8H300), bench tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value when chain has jumped or caused valve/piston damage

problems.recommendation: On a Nissan Lafesta worth £2,000-£5,000, preventative timing chain replacement at 60k miles is cost-effective. If you hear rattling or the chain has jumped, replacement with a rebuilt unit including upgraded components is the only reliable solution.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt QR20DE engine prices for your Nissan Lafesta

problems.h4: Nissan Lafesta Oil Pump Failure - QR20DE Low Oil Pressure Issues
problems.rootCause: Oil pump drive chain wear or pump body wear reduces oil pressure; low oil levels accelerate the failure.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove sump, replace oil pump and drive components
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if caught at first oil warning light; no bearing damage

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt QR20DE/QR18DE with new pump, upgraded components, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Required if low oil pressure caused bearing wear or knock

problems.recommendation: If your Lafesta shows oil pressure warning but no knocking, a specialist oil pump replacement may save the engine. If you hear bottom-end knock, replacement is the only safe option.
problems.cta: Get quotes for QR20DE oil pump repair or replacement

problems.group: Nissan Lafesta Direct Injection Carbon Buildup
problems.h4: Nissan Lafesta Direct Injection Carbon Buildup - B35 MR-Series Issues
problems.affectedModels: Nissan Lafesta B35 1.8L/2.0L DI Turbo (2011-2018, MR18DDT/MR20DDT)
problems.rootCause: Direct injection sprays fuel into cylinder, not over intake valves; oil vapour from PCV system bakes onto valves causing carbon deposits.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove intake manifold, blast carbon from valves with walnut media
Replace faulty high-pressure injectors plus valve cleaning
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses misfires and rough idle from injector failure

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt MR18DDT/MR20DDT with updated components, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best when carbon has caused valve damage or severe performance loss

problems.recommendation: Regular walnut shell cleaning every 40k miles prevents severe buildup on B35 Lafestas. If performance is severely degraded or valves are damaged, a rebuilt engine with updated components offers better long-term value.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt MR20DDT engine prices for your B35 Lafesta

problems.h4: Nissan Lafesta CVT Integration Problems - ECU Mapping & Compatibility
problems.affectedModels: Nissan Lafesta All CVT Variants (2004-2018, QR20DE/MR20DDT with CVT)
problems.typicalFailureMileage: Variable; often post-engine-replacement if mapping incorrect
problems.rootCause: CVT transmission requires precise ECU calibration; incorrect mapping after engine swap causes judder, limp mode, or transmission damage.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - CVT Fluid Service + ECU Reset
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Drain/fill CVT fluid, reset adaptation values via diagnostic tool
repairOptions.longevity: Routine maintenance; may resolve minor judder

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - ECU Remap for Engine Swap
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Specialist ECU reprogramming to match replacement engine to CVT
repairOptions.longevity: Essential after engine replacement; prevents transmission issues

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with matched CVT, full ECU integration, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best when both engine and CVT have high mileage or damage

problems.recommendation: Never swap a Lafesta engine without confirming CVT ECU compatibility. Use a JDM specialist who can program the ECU correctly; this prevents costly transmission damage and ensures smooth operation.
problems.cta: Find Nissan Lafesta CVT-compatible engine replacement specialists

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Nissan Lafesta
finalCta.paragraph: Timing chain issues, oil pump wear, and direct injection carbon buildup are the most common reasons Nissan Lafesta owners need engine replacement. EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Lafesta specialists who understand JDM import complexities. Every rebuilt engine includes upgraded components addressing known failure points, bench testing, and a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Nissan Lafesta Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Nissan Lafesta and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineYears.h2: Nissan Lafesta Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This timeline covers all major engine changes across the Nissan Lafesta's UK import history, organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt prices from specialists.

years.description: The original M11 Lafesta launched with QR-series port-injection petrol engines, establishing the MPV formula popular with UK grey import buyers.
keyChanges: Lafesta launched in Japan; UK grey imports begin
QR20DE 2.0L and QR18DE 1.8L petrol engines introduced
CVT automatic standard on most variants
knownFor: Robust QR-series architecture but weak timing chain tensioner
CVT integration requires careful ECU mapping
Popular alternative to Nissan Serena for UK importers
Early units may have higher mileage from Japanese use
years.cta: Get quotes for 2004-2007 Nissan Lafesta replacement engines
years.ticker: Nissan Lafesta QR20DE engine replacement • Lafesta timing chain problems • QR20DE oil pump failure

years.description: The M12 facelift refreshed styling and updated interior features while retaining the proven QR-series engines, becoming the most common Lafesta generation in the UK.
keyChanges: Exterior and interior refresh for M12 facelift
Minor emissions and efficiency updates to QR engines
Highway Star trim gains popularity with UK enthusiasts
knownFor: Peak UK import numbers; largest addressable replacement market
Timing chain tensioner failures now well-documented on forums
Good parts compatibility with Primera/X-Trail QR engines
CVT judder issues often misdiagnosed as engine problems
years.cta: Get quotes for 2008-2011 Nissan Lafesta replacement engines
years.ticker: M12 Lafesta engine replacement • QR20DE timing chain kit • Lafesta CVT engine mapping

years.description: The all-new B35 Lafesta switched to MR-series direct injection turbo engines, improving efficiency but introducing new failure patterns requiring specialist knowledge.
keyChanges: All-new B35 platform with modern styling
QR-series replaced by MR18DDT/MR20DDT direct injection turbo engines
Improved fuel economy and emissions compliance
Updated CVT with refined control logic
mainEngines: MR20DDT - 2.0L direct injection turbo (B35 2.0L, Highway Star, 4WD)
knownFor: Direct injection carbon buildup on intake valves becomes key concern
Turbocharger reliability generally good with proper maintenance
Higher rebuild costs due to DI/turbo complexity
ECU mapping critical for CVT compatibility after engine swap
years.cta: Get quotes for 2011-2015 Nissan Lafesta replacement engines
years.ticker: B35 Lafesta MR20DDT engine • Lafesta direct injection carbon cleaning • MR20DDT turbo replacement

years.preview: B35 Late Production & End of Line
years.description: Final B35 production years saw minor updates before Lafesta discontinuation in 2018; these late models command premium prices in the UK used import market.
keyChanges: Minor cosmetic and equipment updates for late B35
UK import supply now limited to existing stock
Growing demand for specialist rebuild knowledge as units age
mainEngines: MR20DDT - 2.0L direct injection turbo (B35 2.0L, Highway Star, 4WD)
popularModels: Nissan Lafesta B35 Late 2.0L DI Turbo
Nissan Lafesta B35 Final Highway Star
knownFor: Lowest mileage examples in UK market; higher replacement values
Same MR-series failure patterns as earlier B35 units
Growing need for specialists familiar with DI turbo rebuilds
JDM parts sourcing remains challenging for UK owners
years.cta: Get quotes for 2016-2018 Nissan Lafesta replacement engines

faq.h2: Nissan Lafesta Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: What engine does a Nissan Lafesta have?
items.answer: Nissan Lafesta models use petrol engines only: QR20DE/QR18DE port-injection (2004-2011 M11/M12) or MR20DDT/MR18DDT direct-injection turbo (2011-2018 B35). No diesel variants were ever sold.
keyPoints: M11/M12: QR20DE 2.0L or QR18DE 1.8L port-injection petrol
B35: MR20DDT 2.0L or MR18DDT 1.8L direct-injection turbo petrol
All variants use CVT automatic transmission
Engine code is stamped on block; check near oil filter housing
items.cta: Get quotes for your Nissan Lafesta engine code

items.question: How much does a Nissan Lafesta QR20DE engine replacement cost UK?
items.answer: Rebuilt QR20DE engines for M11/M12 Lafesta typically cost £950-£2,400 supply-only in the UK, with supply & fit adding £450-£950 depending on location and workshop.
keyPoints: Rebuilt units include upgraded timing tensioner (OEM 13075-8H300)
Used engines from £650 but verify compression and history
Supply & fit service recommended for CVT ECU mapping
12-month warranty standard on rebuilt/reconditioned units
items.cta: Compare rebuilt QR20DE engine prices for your Lafesta

items.question: Is the Nissan Lafesta engine reliable?
items.answer: QR20DE engines are robust but suffer documented timing chain tensioner failure; MR-series B35 engines are efficient but require intake valve cleaning. Regular maintenance prevents most issues.
keyPoints: QR20DE: Replace timing chain kit preventatively at 60k miles
MR-series: Walnut shell clean intake valves every 40k miles
Oil changes every 5k miles critical for longevity
CVT fluid service prevents transmission-related complaints
items.cta: Find reliable Nissan Lafesta engine specialists UK

items.question: Will a Nissan Primera engine fit my Lafesta?
items.answer: Yes, QR20DE engines from Primera P12, X-Trail T30 and Note share fitment with M11/M12 Lafesta; B35 MR-series engines have more limited cross-compatibility. Always verify ECU/CVT mapping.
keyPoints: QR20DE from Primera P12 (2002-2007) is direct swap for M11/M12
Mounting points and wiring harness compatible on QR-series
B35 MR20DDT has limited donor options; specialist sourcing advised
CVT-equipped Lafestas require ECU reprogramming after swap
items.cta: Check QR20DE compatibility for your Lafesta variant

items.question: What causes Lafesta timing chain failure?
items.answer: QR20DE timing chain failure stems from weak factory tensioner design allowing chain stretch; Nissan issued TSBs acknowledging the issue. Failure typically occurs 60k-100k miles.
keyPoints: Factory tensioner lacks sufficient damping for long-term use
Chain stretch causes rattling, then jumped timing
Low oil levels or infrequent changes accelerate wear
Upgraded tensioner (13075-8H300) prevents recurrence
items.cta: Get quotes for QR20DE timing chain replacement

items.question: Is Nissan Lafesta petrol or diesel?
items.answer: All Nissan Lafesta models sold in the UK are petrol-only. No diesel variant was ever produced for any market, eliminating DPF or diesel-specific concerns for import owners.
keyPoints: Lafesta was designed as a compact petrol MPV for Japan
QR and MR engine families are petrol-only architectures
No AdBlue, DPF or diesel emissions systems to maintain
Petrol engines simpler to source and rebuild in UK
items.cta: Compare petrol engine prices for your Nissan Lafesta

items.question: How long does a Nissan Lafesta engine last?
items.answer: With proper maintenance, QR20DE engines can exceed 150k miles; MR-series B35 units are newer so long-term data is limited but 120k+ miles is achievable with valve cleaning.
keyPoints: QR20DE: Replace timing kit at 60k, oil pump inspection at 80k
MR-series: Intake valve cleaning every 40k miles essential
Full service history and quality oil critical for longevity
Rebuilt engines with upgraded components can match new-engine life
items.cta: Find long-life rebuilt engines for your Lafesta

items.question: Can I rebuild my Nissan Lafesta QR20DE engine?
items.answer: Yes, QR20DE is straightforward to rebuild; most UK specialists offer rebuilt units with upgraded timing components for £950-£2,400, often better value than repair after major failure.
keyPoints: Rebuild addresses timing chain, oil pump and bearing wear
Upgraded tensioner (13075-8H300) prevents repeat failure
Bench testing ensures reliability before installation
12-month warranty provides peace of mind vs DIY repair
items.cta: Get quotes for QR20DE rebuilt engine supply

keyPoints: Network includes JDM import specialists familiar with Lafesta
All suppliers offer minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty
Supply-only or full supply & fit options available
Registration lookup ensures exact engine code match
items.cta: Compare Nissan Lafesta engine prices from UK specialists

items.question: Does Nissan Lafesta have CVT transmission problems?
items.answer: CVT issues are often misdiagnosed as engine problems; proper ECU mapping after engine replacement is critical. Judder or limp mode usually indicates transmission, not engine, fault.
keyPoints: CVT fluid service every 40k miles prevents judder
Engine swaps require specialist ECU reprogramming
Transmission faults can trigger check engine light
Use Lafesta-specialist workshops for CVT-integrated repairs
items.cta: Find CVT-compatible engine replacement for your Lafesta
